# blogs.py
A blog generator for websites using Markdown.

```
python blogs.py new
```

## Commands
| Command | Parameters      | Function                    |
| :-----: | :--------:      | --------                    |
| `new`   | N/A             | New blog folder             |
| `blog`  | N/A             | New blog                    |
| `build` | N/A             | Build blogs from MD to HTML |

## Dependencies
* Python-Markdown
